content: {"business_logic": "Visualiza y administra el cat\u00e1logo de productos, permitiendo ajustes de stock y visualizaci\u00f3n de m\u00e9tricas de entrada/salida.", "dependencies": ["react", "dexie-react-hooks", "@/lib/dexie", "@/lib/ipv/engine", "@/components/ui/badge", "@/components/ui/BaseModal", "@/components/ui/button", "@/components/ui/card", "@/components/ui/label", "lucide-react", "@/components/ui/input", "@/lib/utils", "@/components/ui/switch", "sonner", "@/lib/supabaseClient", "@/hooks/api/useStores", "@/store", "@/lib/roles", "@/lib/ipv/utils", "@/lib/ipv/importUtils", "@/components/ui/ActionMenu", "xlsx"], "domain": "UI", "exports": ["CatalogTable"], "id": "src/components/views/terminal/views/ipv/CatalogTable.tsx", "name": "CatalogTable.tsx", "technical_description": "Componente de gesti\u00f3n de inventario.", "user_description": "Elemento de la interfaz de usuario para interactuar con CatalogTable.tsx."}
